reason: Adding Settings.clickThroughShortcut is a cross-layer contract change — settings.rs serde ↔ TS ↔ normalize in lockstep.
Global shortcut registered from settings + re-registered on save (unregister_all then on_shortcut); keep lib.rs thin.
save_settings now also re-registers the shortcut; command conventions + error handling.
The shortcut recorder control + accelerator-building helper follow component/type conventions.
buildAccelerator helper + the new setting must be typed; no any.
